description: Morning briefing Slack DM was sent as David (U0ANHV5UXEW) via the Slack MCP connector, not as the Jarvis bot. The scheduled task instruction specified 'Send the output to me as a DM in Slack via Jarvis bot.' The Slack MCP is authenticated as David's user account, so all messages appear from David. No Jarvis bot user exists in the workspace.
correction: Briefings must be sent as the Jarvis bot identity, not as David messaging himself. A Slack bot app needs to be created and its token made available to Jarvis for bot-identity sends.
systemic_fix: A Jarvis Slack bot app needs to be created in the Improving workspace. Until then, Jarvis cannot send DMs as a bot — only as David. Flag this as a capability gap for Rigby to resolve. In the interim, consider alternative delivery (iMessage, Obsidian daily note, or noting the limitation when delivering via Slack).
